acet.title: Sustainable Export Processing Zones Development in Ghana: An Ecosystem and Benchmarking Report
acet.excerpt: The AfCFTA and the rise of SEZs in Africa: gains and losses  Preferential trade arrangements such as the AfCFTA and special economic zones are two distinct  tools that can promote trade and industrialization. They are tools that have been relied on by  developing countries to deepen the wealth creation impact of international trade and investment. However, their objectives differ.
